caption: The video appears to be a news segment or documentary titled "PLUS POLITICS," focusing on political events and discussions. There are also shots of people walking under umbrellas, suggesting it might be raining. A man is seen speaking, likely addressing the crowd or participating in an interview. The video includes multiple frames with different timestamps and labels such as "EPP," "UJI," and "RDP," indicating different segments or topics within the broader political theme.
